data.title: Asees Kaur Hometown Concert | Live in Panipat | Jugni, Ve Kamleya, Akh Lad Jaave
data.description:
Back to my hometown, Panipat, after 12 years for a LIVE Concert. 
#AseesKaurLive

Drums - Jigar Shah
Percussions - Rishabh ...“Khalsa Sajaya” is a deeply personal composition by Asees Kaur, created from a place that feels very close to her roots and ...Live in Pragati Maidan, New Delhi for Asia Pacific Predators League, along with Raftaar, KRSNA & Nikhita G.
